title: physostemon procumbens subsp. obtusa
intro: Physostemon procumbens subsp. obtusa is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family and is native to the tropical regions of Africa. It is commonly used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Physostemon procumbens subsp. obtusa include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
